query: SELECT COUNT(*) as missing_phone, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM agents) as total FROM agents WHERE phone IS NULL OR phone = '';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4XhD5JGzFycvBf8.root --database iwEifGeLgtJbCVjTZgrjir --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as missing_phone, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM agents) as total FROM agents WHERE phone IS NULL OR phone = '';
